description: A centered text block featuring a large statement heading with an optional highlighted keyword, a supporting description paragraph, and a CTA link. Used to introduce major page sections.

FR-01.title: Statement Heading
FR-01.description: The block MUST display a large statement heading (H3) that conveys a key message.

FR-02.title: Highlighted Keyword
FR-02.description: The heading SHOULD support a visually highlighted keyword (e.g., underline, color accent, or bold emphasis).
acceptance: One or more words within the heading styled differently (e.g., underline decoration or accent color)
Implemented via inline <span> or <em> with CSS styling

FR-03.title: Description Paragraph
FR-03.description: The block MUST display a supporting description paragraph below the heading.

FR-04.title: CTA Link
FR-04.description: The block SHOULD include an optional CTA link below the description.
acceptance: Text link with 'Opens in same window' indicator

accessibility.AC-01: Heading level MUST be appropriate within the page heading hierarchy
accessibility.AC-02: Highlighted keyword styling MUST NOT rely solely on color (use underline or font-weight as well)
